description: A usage-analytics dashboard for Claude Code with mock state and an adaptive NavigationView shell. Tracks coding sessions, token consumption (input, output, cache read/write), and cost across models. Includes a Dashboard (KPI cards, daily usage rollups, model breakdown), a Sessions list with a Session Detail page, a Usage page (per-model pricing and cost breakdown), and a Charts page. Clean, professional desktop/mobile UI.

messages.content:
Generate a production-ready Claude Code usage tracker app with:
- mock state
- a clean, professional desktop/mobile UI
- a NavigationView shell

Dashboard:
- KPI cards (total sessions, total tokens, total cost, average cost per session)
- a daily usage rollup (tokens and cost over time)
- a model usage breakdown (share per model)

Pages:
- Dashboard, Sessions (list of coding sessions), Session Detail, Usage (per-model pricing and cost breakdown), Charts

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (sessions, model pricing, daily usage)
Here's your **Claude Code Tracker** app! It's built and running in the preview.

suggestedPrompts: Add a date-range filter to the dashboard
Add a chart to the Charts page

messages.content:
Generate a production-ready Claude Code usage tracker app with:
- mock state
- a clean, professional desktop/mobile UI
- a NavigationView shell

Dashboard:
- KPI cards (total sessions, total tokens, total cost, average cost per session)
- a daily usage rollup (tokens and cost over time)
- a model usage breakdown (share per model)

Pages:
- Dashboard, Sessions (list of coding sessions), Session Detail, Usage (per-model pricing and cost breakdown), Charts

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (sessions, model pricing, daily usage)

I've created a complete Uno Platform app at ClaudeCodeTracker/ClaudeCodeTracker.csproj.

**Key files:**
- ClaudeCodeTracker/App.xaml
- ClaudeCodeTracker/App.xaml.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/GlobalUsings.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/ThemeColors.xaml
- ClaudeCodeTracker/ClaudeCodeTracker.csproj
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Models/AppConfig.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/MainPage.xaml
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/MainPage.xaml.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/MainModel.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/DashboardPage.xaml
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/DashboardPage.xaml.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/SessionsPage.xaml
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/SessionsPage.xaml.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/SessionDetailPage.xaml
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/SessionDetailPage.xaml.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/UsagePage.xaml
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/UsagePage.xaml.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/ChartsPage.xaml
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/ChartsPage.xaml.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/MockData/SharedTypes.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/MockData/DashboardPageMockData.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/MockData/SessionsPageMockData.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/MockData/SessionDetailPageMockData.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/MockData/UsagePageMockData.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Presentation/MockData/ChartsPageMockData.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Platforms/Desktop/Program.cs
- ClaudeCodeTracker/Platforms/WebAssembly/Program.cs

**Structure:**
- MainPage hosts a NavigationView (uen:Region.Attached) with menu items Dashboard, Sessions, Usage and Charts. The content area uses a visibility-based region navigator (uen:Region.Navigator="Visibility") to switch pages.
- DashboardPage shows KPI cards, a daily-usage rollup, and a model-usage breakdown. SessionsPage lists coding sessions and navigates to SessionDetailPage. UsagePage shows per-model pricing and a cost breakdown. ChartsPage visualizes daily usage and model share.
- Domain records live in Presentation/MockData/SharedTypes.cs: SessionEntry (model, duration, input/output/cache tokens, cost, status, project, message count), ModelInfo (per-1M pricing), DailyUsage (daily token/cost rollup), and ModelUsageBreakdown (per-model share). Each page has a matching *MockData.cs file holding seeded data.
- Styling is centralized in App.xaml and ThemeColors.xaml.

The app is built and running. The user may ask me to modify it.
